shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character idle state before game starts
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0px (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when game is in pre-start state, waiting for player input to begin

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with upright posture, short front legs, large head, thick tail
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, no gradients

animation.description: Subtle breathing animation - frame 1: neutral pose, frame 2: slight body shift. Total duration: 0.33 seconds per loop

visual_specification.details: Eyes open and alert, standing upright on two legs, tail extended horizontally for balance

relationships.shared_with: Same base sprite dimensions and color as all player states
relationships.differences_from: player_run has faster animation (12 FPS vs 6 FPS), player_jump is static single frame, player_duck is wider (118px) and shorter (60px)

explicit_negations: No motion blur or particle effects
No transparency except full alpha channel
No rotation or skewing of sprite
